Set the GitHub "About" box on the repo home page (requires Admin on RubberDuck-com/rubberduck-use-case-playground).
Push access alone cannot set description, website, or topics via API.

Where: https://github.com/RubberDuck-com/rubberduck-use-case-playground
→ click the gear icon next to "About" on the right sidebar (or Settings → General).

=== DESCRIPTION (paste into About) ===

Official hands-on training for RubberDuck. Ten runnable labs with verify scripts, a shared Python demo app, official Guided Prompt Library prompts, and per-use-case branches. Practice codebase atlas, security audit, bug localization, PR review, impact analysis, feature planning, and codegen.

=== WEBSITE ===

https://rubberduck.com/#docs

=== TOPICS (add each as a topic) ===

rubberduck
mcp
developer-tools
security
training
cursor
code-analysis
hands-on-labs
python
